Sure! I'd be happy to help you plan this project. Rig N5 (plan §9.3 / W1-W2
surface): a 14B reply that contains NO parseable JSON array at all — the
deterministic parser must yield zero candidates and the dispatch must fall
back to a single validated task, never crash and never produce zero work.

First, we should think carefully about the storage layer. Then the add
command would be a natural second step, and finally the list command brings
it all together. Let me know if you would like me to elaborate on any of
these steps before we begin!
